summary: The implementation covers most requirements but has significant gaps in multiplayer functionality, match state management, and some acceptance criteria. The backend lacks match state tracking, and the frontend doesn't fully implement battle royale mechanics like victory conditions or proper player targeting.

missing_requirements.requirement: Environment includes multiple rooms or areas for battle royale gameplay
missing_requirements.reason: GameArena.tsx only creates a single square arena with 4 central obstacles. No multiple rooms or areas are implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Match begins with multiple players in the arena
missing_requirements.reason: No match initialization logic found. The game doesn't have a proper match start system that spawns multiple players.

missing_requirements.requirement: Clear victory condition when one player/team remains
missing_requirements.reason: No victory condition logic implemented. The game doesn't detect when only one player remains alive or display victory state.

missing_requirements.requirement: Option to start new match after completion
missing_requirements.reason: No match restart or new match functionality found in the codebase.
Backend in main.mo has no match state tracking (no match ID, start time, active players list, or match status fields).
The shoot function in main.mo doesn't validate if shooter is alive, in range, or has line of sight. No validation logic present.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication system with login/logout functionality
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest specifies no real-time multiplayer or authentication features. The implementation includes full Internet Identity integration (useInternetIdentity.ts, InternetIdentityProvider) which was not requested.
No social media integration or footer links were requested in the BuildRequest.

hallucinated_features.description: Pointer lock mechanism for mouse control
hallucinated_features.reason: While mouse controls were requested, the specific pointer lock implementation with click-to-lock behavior was not specified and goes beyond basic mouse aiming.
